items.raw_excerpt: Etter en modell fra Nederland skal Bærum kommune bygge en landsby for nærmere 100 demente på Dønski.
items.summary_en: Bærum municipality plans to build a dedicated village for nearly 100 people with dementia at Dønski. The project follows a model from the Netherlands and focuses on a local, community-like care setting.
items.title_en: Bærum to Build a Dementia Village
items.title_original: Egen landsby for demente i Bærum – Stor-Oslo - NRK

items.raw_excerpt: If you've been busy with work, or stressed with life, then it sounds like you might be in need of some of today's Danish word.
items.summary_en: The article introduces the Danish word "alenetid," a term connected to spending time alone. It frames the word as useful for people feeling busy, stressed, or in need of personal space.

items.raw_excerpt: SANTA FIORA – Il grande ciclismo giovanile mondiale fa tappa sulle strade della Toscana. Il 22 e 23 maggio 2026 si terrà la Tuscany Cycling Academy
items.summary_en: The Tuscany Cycling Academy Juniors will bring international youth cycling to the roads of Tuscany. The event is scheduled for May 22 and 23, 2026, around Santa Fiora and Monte Amiata.

items.title_original: Ciclismo internazionale sul Monte Amiata col Tuscany Cycling Academy Juniores - Il Giunco.net

items.raw_excerpt: The Iraq national men's team hasn't played a World Cup in 40 years; a drought that ends Tuesday night, to the excitement of soccer fans in Dearborn, Michigan, home to a large Iraqi diaspora.
items.summary_en: Iraqi soccer fans in Dearborn, Michigan are excited as Iraq's men's national team ends a 40-year World Cup absence. The story focuses on the local celebration among Dearborn's large Iraqi diaspora.
items.title_en: Iraqi Soccer Fans in Dearborn Celebrate World Cup Return
items.title_original: Iraqi soccer fans celebrate end of 40-year World Cup drought

items.raw_excerpt: Chris Dryneck says the deteriorating conditions of his Behchokǫ̀ home need repair, due to worsening issues and the pressing situation of his daughter recovering from a spinal surgery. Dryneck says with his 14 year-old daughter being disabled and himself being blind, the opportunities to fix the home himself are extremely slim.
items.summary_en: A Behchokǫ̀ father says his deteriorating home has gone without needed repairs for years, including a decade without water. He says the situation is urgent because his disabled 14-year-old daughter is recovering from spinal surgery and he is blind, making repairs nearly impossible for him to handle himself.
items.title_en: '10 years of no water': Behchokǫ̀, N.W.T., father waits for needed home repairs as daughter recovers from surgery
items.title_original: '10 years of no water': Behchokǫ̀, N.W.T., father waits for needed home repairs as daughter recovers from surgery

items.summary_en: Defensive tackle Keegan Gray-Wyckoff from Antwerp, Ohio High School has committed to Temple. The story centers on a small-town high school football player heading to North Philadelphia for college football.

items.raw_excerpt: Kozhikode (Kerala), Jun 13 (PTI) A stadium in the middle of a Kerala river with the entire Argentine squad standing on it! No, the South American team has not finally arrived in the state—but it is a float created by football-crazy fans in Pullavoor village here. Football mania has already gripped the state in the […]
items.summary_en: Fans in Pullavoor village near Kozhikode created a floating stadium display in a Kerala river, complete with cutouts of the Argentine football squad. The playful installation reflects the area's intense football fandom ahead of Argentina-related excitement in the state.
items.title_en: Kerala Football Fans Float an Argentina Stadium in a River
items.title_original: Argentina fans in Kerala village set up floating stadium with squad cutouts in river - ThePrint

items.raw_excerpt: Maries største smil i år kom da hun hadde med meg rørleggerpappa på Høstutstillingen. Han gikk rundt som et levende spørsmålstegn, stoppet ved hvert verk og lurte på hva i all verden som var poenget.
items.summary_en: Oslo artist Mari Tveiten, 32, has released a song and describes her neighborhood Torshov as feeling like a village in the middle of the city. The excerpt highlights a humorous personal moment at the Autumn Exhibition, where her plumber father puzzled over the artworks.

items.raw_excerpt: Supreme Court directs Odisha government to ensure social security and basic amenities for an octogenarian and her visually impaired son.

items.raw_excerpt: Lord Mayor Adrian Schrinner says Brisbane is paying the cost of natural disasters such as Cyclone Alfred and a lack of funding from the state and federal governments.
items.summary_en: Brisbane City Council is planning a rate increase as it prepares its 2026-27 budget. Lord Mayor Adrian Schrinner says the city is carrying extra costs from natural disasters such as Cyclone Alfred, along with insufficient state and federal funding.

items.title_original: Brisbane home owners face rate hike as council tightens its budget
